req.title: Hr-Admin deletes payroll-run
req.statement: An authenticated hr-admin shall be able to delete a payroll-run through the REST API. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must be written on success.

telemetry.raw_response_head:
```python
"""
Tests for HR-Admin Payroll Run Deletion via REST API

Requirements covered:
- Authenticated hr-admin can delete a payroll run
- Mandatory fields are validated
- An audit record is written on successful deletion
"""

import pytest
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, ANY
from http import HTTPStatus


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@pytest.fixture
def hr_admin_token(client):
    """Return a valid JWT / session token for an hr-admin user."""
    response = client.post(
        "/api/auth/login",
        json={"username": "hr_admin@example.com", "password": "S3cret!"},
    )
    assert response.status_code == HTTPStatus.OK
    return response.json()["access_token"]


@pytest.fixture
def non_admin_token(client):
    """Return a valid JWT / session token for a regular (non-admin) user."""
    response = client.post(
        "/api/auth/login",
        json={"username": "employee@example.com", "password": "S3cret!"},
    )
    assert response.status_code == HTTPStatus.OK
    return response.json()["access_token"]


@pytest.fixture
def existing_payroll_run(db_session):
    """Insert a payroll run into the database and return its record."""
    from myapp.models import PayrollRun  # adjust import to real module

    run = PayrollRun(
        id=str(uuid.uuid4()),
        period_start="2024-01-01",
        period_end="2024-01-31",
        status="DRAFT",
        created_by="hr_admin@example.com",
        created_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    )
    db_session.add(run)
    db_session.commit()
    db_session.refresh(run)
    return run


@pytest.fixture
def locked_payroll_run(db_session):
    """Insert a LOCKED payroll run that should not be deletable."""
    from myapp.models import PayrollRun

    run = PayrollRun(
        id=str(uuid.uuid4()),
        period_start="2024-02-01",
        period_end="2024-02-29",
        status="LOCKED",
        created_by="hr_admin@example.com",
        created_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    )
    db_session.add(run)
    db_session.commit()
    db_session.refresh(run)
    return run


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def delete_payroll_run(client, run_id, token=None, reason=None):
    """Convenience wrapper around the DELETE endpoint."""
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"} if token else {}
    payload = {}
    if reason is not None:
        payload["reason"] = reason
    return client.delete(
        f"/api/payroll-runs/{run_id}",
        headers=headers,
        json=payload if payload else None,
    )


# ===========================================================================
# 1. Authentication & Authorisation
# ===========================================================================

class TestAuthentication:
    def test_unauthenticated_request_is_rejected(self, client, existing_payroll_run):
        """DELETE without a token must return 401 Unauthorized."""
        response = delete_payroll_run(
            client, existing_payroll_run.id, token=None, reason="Test deletion"
        )
        assert response.status_code == HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED

    def test_non_admin_user_is_forbidden(self, client, existing_payroll_run, non_admin_token):
        """A non-hr-admin user must receive 403 Forbidden."""
        response = delete_payroll_run(
            client,
            existing_payroll_run.id,
            token=non_admin_token,
            reason="Test deletion",
        )
        assert response.status_code == HTTPStatus.FORBIDDEN

    def test_expired_token_is_rejected(self, client, existing_payroll_run):
        """An expired token must return 401 Unauthorized."""
        expired_token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.EXPI
